e1_q1.question: Which year range is used, and what is the average sales value after filtering?
e1_q1.description: Initial evaluation fixture for operation-spec step playback.

steps.text: Filter the chart to show values from 2010 through 2013.
Compute the average sales value over the filtered years.

e1_q2.question: What is the difference between the maximum and minimum values?
e1_q2.description: Second evaluation fixture for navigation and replay.

steps.text: Compute the difference between those two values.

e1_bad.question: This chart intentionally contains an invalid operation step.
e1_bad.description: Used to verify that the viewer reports errors without blanking the chart.
